chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No. 2304 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Present: Mr. Justice Omar Sial Mr. Justice Miran Muhammad Shah For hearing of bail application 27.10.2025 Mr. Zakir Hussain Boghio Advocate for the Applicants Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Additional Prosecutor General.-.-.-.-.-. OMAR SIAL, J.- Ammad Khan son of Iqbal Hassan and Romaan Khan son of Muhammad Iqbal sought post-arrest bail in crime number 164 of 2025 registered under sections 9(I) 3(b) of CNS (Amendment) Act, 2024 at Police Station Artillery Maidan, Karachi. Their earlier bail pleas were dismissed vide order dated 27.08.2025 by the learned Sessions Judge/Special Judge (CNS), Karachi South. 2. Ammad Khan and Romaan Khan were arrested on 13.07.2025 by SIP Syed Bashir Hussain Shah from Raja Ghazanfar Ali Khan Road, Saddar Karachi, and on their personal search from possession of Ammad Khan and Romaan Khan 650 grams and 750 gram charas respectively was recovered. 3. We have heard the learned counsel for the applicants and the learned Additional Prosecutor General. Our observations are as follows. 4. The offence with which the applicants are charged, although not bailable, falls within the non-prohibitory clause of section 497 Cr.P.C. Keeping in mind the principles enunciated in Tariq Bashir and 5 others vs The State (PLD 1985 SC 34), we do not see any exceptional or extraordinary ground to deny the applicants bail. It is also yet to be seen whether the applicants themselves are users of narcotics and, in essence, victims of the drug trade. The State is yet to establish effective rehabilitation institutions for this purpose.

It is also yet to be seen whether the applicants themselves are users of narcotics and, in essence, victims of the drug trade. The State is yet to establish effective rehabilitation institutions for this purpose. The applicants are admitted to bail subject to furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
